problem: No TikTok presence. Existing Remotion video pipeline for X could be extended to TikTok with new vertical templates and TikTok-native content.

options_presented.description: Full TikTok content pipeline using existing Remotion infrastructure with new vertical templates, TikTok API integration, and TikTok-native content strategy
pros: Tests the full Flintstones Framework on a micro-project

fred_reasoning: Good test for new business framework with QA loop. Micro project within TPCR.

problem: TikTok visual style direction — need to choose the look and feel for vertical content templates

options_presented.description: TikTok Energy — fast, snappy, neon accent pops, glitch transitions, screen shake on reveals. 15-20s max. High-energy, appeals to 18-25.
Premium Minimalist — smooth, sophisticated motion, gold accents, glass morphism. 20-25s. Calm, premium feel. Appeals to 25-40 planners.
cons: May not grab attention fast enough

options_presented.description: Cozy Data Storytelling — bouncy, playful spring animations, warmer pastels, theme park iconography. 18-22s. Family-friendly, approachable data. Disney Adult alignment.

fred_reasoning: Feels more like the style he's looking for. Warm, approachable, on-brand.

problem: TikTok posting cadence — how often to post on the new platform

options_presented.description: Conservative — 3-4 posts/week. Mon prediction, Wed educational, Fri weekend forecast.
Moderate — 5-7 posts/week. Daily crowd predictions + 2x weekly educational/entertainment. Betty's recommendation.
Aggressive — 10-14 posts/week. Multiple posts daily, real-time trending content.

fred_reasoning: Deferred to Betty's recommendation. Trusts specialist judgment on content cadence.
